data.raceComments: {"comment":"3. CAMBLA DIVA comes off a (29.94) win last time, scoring by one length in a Grade 4/5 over 510m at this track. Looks suited and should go close. 2. MISS BELLA BLUE boasts a strong record this journey with eight wins and seven minors from 21 tries. Missed the frame latest (24.20) when sixth over 407m at this track in a OPEN. With even luck and a clean start should be thereabouts. 1. RANGER BEACH turned spotting a big start finishing fourth (24.01) last time in a Free For All at this track. Good beginner assisted by the inside draw. Bold showing expected. 8. WILMA FLINTSTONE can return to form after missing the top-three at this circuit last time out.","runners":[3,2,1,8],"exclusive":false}
